surfaces.cards: bg-white border border-[#E5E7E2] rounded-2xl shadow-sm hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-lg transition-all duration-300
surfaces.glass: backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70 border border-white/40 shadow-sm rounded-2xl

components.navigation: Sticky header (z-50) using crystal glass surface. Brand on left, navigation links center, Login/Cart buttons right. Do not hide desktop links behind a hamburger menu.
components.hero: Bento layout or asymmetrical split. Left side: Text and CTA. Right side: Image with hero_overlay. Do not center everything.
components.product_catalog: Use standard grid (cols-1 sm:cols-2 lg:cols-3) with generous gaps. Sidebar for filtering (categories, price). Cards should have crisp borders and subtle nested radii.
components.buttons: Rounded-full for primary CTA (px-8 py-3 text-sm font-semibold). Background: Primary, Text: Primary Foreground. Hover must be explicitly defined (e.g., hover:bg-[#143D2E]/90).
components.testimonials: Editorial ribbon marquee style using react-fast-marquee. Low contrast, wide spacing (gap-24), serif or elegant sans-serif, muted backgrounds.
components.checkout: Use customized Shadcn form components (Input, Select). Clean layout, right column for order summary.

testimonial_bg.description: Group of doctors looking at screen

motion.marquee: Use react-fast-marquee for editorial ribbon with slow drift

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a hybrid fullstack app using React, Tailwind CSS, and Shadcn UI components.
Follow the Archetype 1 (Organic & Earthy) using the exact hex codes provided. Do NOT default to Vercel/Stripe stark black and white.
Implement the Layout with generous spacing (e.g., p-8, py-24). Avoid cramped, standard bootstrap-like spacing.
Use 'Outfit' font for headings and 'Manrope' for body. Update tailwind.config.js to include these fonts.
Include data-testid attributes for ALL interactive elements (buttons, links, inputs, cards) with kebab-case role-based names (e.g., 'add-to-cart-button', 'category-filter').
Ensure header uses glassmorphism and is sticky, but content underneath should have top padding to avoid overlap.
For product cards, use the 'cards' surface style. They must look clean, have accessible contrast, and clear CTA.
Never use pure transparent backgrounds for text-overlays. Use the specified 'hero_overlay' or glassmorphism.
Add react-fast-marquee to dependencies if implementing the testimonial ribbon.
